name: Kisses From Italy Inc.
summary: Kisses from Italy Inc. operates and franchises a chain of restaurants in North America and Europe. The company's restaurants offer sandwiches, salads, Italian roasted coffee, coffee related beverage, desserts, and other products. It also provides its branded products in retail food and grocery stores located in Ontario and Quebec, Canada. The company was incorporated in 2013 and is headquartered in Miami, Florida.
